title: Senior Teacher - Unacademy Global Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Unacademy Global Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Unacademy Global Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Teacher at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Unacademy Global Group:
Unacademy Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unacademy Global Group!
